methods: PostgreSQL (local, loaded from gzipped SQL dump)
requirements_and_restrictions: Manual dump download and load before parser can run

file_formats.notes: Single gzipped SQL dump; no flat-file or REST API bulk download available

primary_identifiers_and_nomenclature: Drug nodes cross-referenced via xrefDrugbank (DrugBank IDs from identifier table)
Disease nodes cross-referenced via UMLS CUI / SNOMED-CT concept ID from omop_relationship

metadata: relationship_name distinguishes indication vs off-label use
OMOP concept_id and concept_name for disease endpoint
umls_cui and snomed_conceptid for disease cross-referencing
class_type for DrugClass (Mechanism of Action, Physiologic Effect, Chemical/Ingredient, Chemical Structure)

drug_treats_disease.status: TSV produced by parser; not yet mapped in ontology_mappings.yaml

drug_palliates_disease.maps_to: off-label use edges (Drug → Disease, off-label use rows)
drug_palliates_disease.status: TSV produced by parser; OWL property name not yet confirmed; not mapped
